content:
End-to-End Industrial Equipment Supply # RailTech delivers certified products from leading global manufacturers to Uzbekistan. We manage the full cycle — from equipment selection to warehouse delivery.
What We Supply # Train Safety Systems — SAUT, KLUB, BLOK, and other microprocessor-based systems Railway Components — sensors, controllers, communication modules, converters Industrial Equipment — measurement, diagnostic, and monitoring instruments Spare Parts — components for routine maintenance and repair Our Advantages # Every shipment is accompanied by a complete documentation package: conformity certificates, quality passports, manufacturer declarations, and operation manuals. We handle customs clearance and logistics, providing a turnkey delivery experience.
To request a commercial quote, use our B2B platform or contact a manager directly.
Ready to discuss your project? Contact us for a commercial proposal or browse the B2B catalog to find the right equipment.

content:
About the Project # As part of the train safety system modernization program for JSC Uzbekistan Railways, RailTech supplied 42 sets of microprocessor-based automatic braking control systems (SAUT).
Objectives # Supply certified equipment manufactured in Russia Full customs clearance and delivery to the client’s depot Technical support during commissioning Depot personnel training Results # Equipment delivered on time and in full All sets successfully commissioned Personnel trained and certified 2-year warranty support provided This project was one of the largest in the company’s history, demonstrating our ability to execute large-scale government contracts.
Want to implement a similar project? Our team is ready to discuss your needs and offer the best solution.

content:
Importing industrial equipment into Uzbekistan is a process that demands attention to detail at every stage. In this guide, we share practical experience and recommendations.
Key Stages of Import # 1. Documentation Preparation # To import industrial equipment, you will need to prepare:
Contract with the foreign supplier Invoice and packing list Certificate of origin Technical documentation for the equipment 2. Customs Clearance # Customs duties on industrial equipment in Uzbekistan range from 0% to 20% depending on the HS code. Preferential rates are available for certain categories of equipment not manufactured domestically.
3. Certification # Most types of industrial equipment are subject to mandatory certification under the UzStandard system. The process includes:
Submitting an application to the certification body Document review Testing (if required) Issuance of a conformity certificate 4. Logistics # Primary delivery routes for equipment to Uzbekistan:
Rail transport — optimal for heavy and oversized equipment Road transport — for urgent and smaller shipments Air freight — for mission-critical components Common Mistakes # Incorrect product classification under the HS code Missing pre-import certification Improperly prepared contract documentation Ignoring labeling requirements How We Help # RailTech manages the entire import process — from equipment selection to warehouse delivery, including customs clearance, certification, and logistics.
summary:

title: Importing Industrial Equipment to Uzbekistan: A Practical Guide

SAUT NIIAS RZD ELTEZA Siemens Knorr-Bremse Alstom Bombardier Frequently Asked Questions # Can’t find the answer? Contact us, and we’ll respond within one business day.
How do I request a commercial quote? Register in the Partner Portal, complete a quick company verification (KYC), browse the catalog to select the items you need, and click ‘Request Quote.’ A dedicated manager will prepare your proposal and deliver it through the portal. Do you work with companies outside Uzbekistan? Yes, we partner with companies from Kazakhstan, Russia, and other CIS countries. For non-resident clients, we offer DAP and CIF delivery terms with full documentation support. What are the typical delivery timelines? Timelines depend on stock availability and country of origin. In-stock items ship within 3 to 10 business days. Made-to-order items are quoted individually when your proposal is prepared. Do you provide certificates for the equipment? Yes, all products are accompanied by conformity certificates, quality passports, and manufacturer declarations. Documents are accessible in the Partner Portal after verification. Is it possible to return a product? Returns are accepted within 14 days, provided proper storage conditions are maintained and packaging is intact. Terms are specified in the supply agreement generated through the Partner Portal. Ready to Optimize Procurement? # Over 120 partners already trust RailTech for industrial and railway equipment supply in Uzbekistan.

content:
Train safety is a top priority in the development of Uzbekistan’s railway sector. In this overview, we examine the current state of safety systems and the prospects for their modernization.
Current State # Uzbekistan’s railway network spans over 6,500 km of track, serving both passenger and freight operations. The train safety system is built on several key components:
Automatic Block Signaling — interval-based train movement regulation Electric Interlocking — switch and signal control Automatic Locomotive Signaling — in-cab signal duplication Automatic Braking Systems — automated braking control Modernization Priorities # The main modernization priorities include:
Transition to microprocessor-based control systems Implementation of real-time diagnostics and monitoring Upgrading lineside safety devices Digitalization of documentation and reporting workflows RailTech’s Role # RailTech is actively contributing to the modernization process by supplying state-of-the-art equipment from leading global manufacturers and providing expert support throughout every stage of implementation.
summary:

content:
RailTech has launched its proprietary digital B2B platform, automating the full cycle of industrial equipment supply in Uzbekistan.
Platform Capabilities # The platform integrates a catalog of 500+ equipment items, a quote calculator with Landed Cost computation, a CRM system for deal management, and a Partner Portal with KYC verification.
The standout feature is Smart Import, which allows users to upload an Excel file with their required items and automatically match them against the catalog. The algorithm achieves approximately 92% accuracy.
Who It’s For # The platform is designed for industrial enterprises procuring equipment for:
Railway infrastructure Industrial manufacturing Safety and monitoring systems How to Get Started # To access the platform, register in the Partner Portal and complete a quick company verification. Once verified, you will gain access to special pricing and the full suite of features.
Learn more about the platform’s capabilities on the Digital Platform page.

content:
An innovation-driven technology company founded in 2021 in Tashkent to provide professional services in equipment supply and engineering project implementation. LLC RailTech was established by experienced industry professionals to deliver expert services in equipment supply, engineering design, and technical project implementation. We are an authorized dealer and official representative of leading international manufacturers of industrial and railway equipment in Uzbekistan.
What We Do # Supply Expertise Localization Representation Equipment Supply — sale and distribution of certified products for the railway and industrial sectors with full customs clearance and delivery. Technical Expertise — consulting, pre-project support, pilot project participation, and personnel training. Production Localization — adapting products to local regulatory requirements and organizing component assembly in Uzbekistan. Representation — representing international companies’ interests, fostering technology partnerships, and tender participation. Mission & Vision # Mission: To provide industrial enterprises in Uzbekistan with world-class equipment and engineering solutions, ensuring reliable supply chains and end-to-end support at every stage. Vision: To become the leading integrator of industrial and railway technologies in Central Asia, combining global expertise with local knowledge. Our Values # Quality Only certified products with complete documentation packages. Every delivery undergoes incoming quality control. Reliability Official warranties and full customs processing. We take responsibility for every link in the supply chain. Innovation Digitalization of all processes through our proprietary B2B platform. Continuous implementation of cutting-edge technologies. Partnership Long-term, transparent relationships with clients and suppliers. Over 120 active partners. Company History # 2021 Launch Company Founded RailTech LLC was established in Tashkent by a team of experienced professionals with deep expertise in the railway and industrial sectors. 2022 Partnerships First Dealer Agreements Official dealer agreements signed with leading Russian manufacturers of train safety systems. 2023 Growth Catalog Expansion Product catalog expanded to 300+ items. Partnerships launched with companies from Kazakhstan and Europe. 2024 Digital B2B Platform Launch Developed and launched a digital B2B platform automating the full supply cycle — from catalog browsing to closing documents. 2025 Scale 500+ SKUs & 120+ Partners Catalog grew to 500+ items, active partner base reached 120+ companies. Production localization initiatives commenced. Partners # Official dealer agreements and long-term partnerships with leading global manufacturers.
SAUT NIIAS RZD ELTEZA Siemens Knorr-Bremse Alstom Bombardier Contact Us Open Catalog

content:
1. General Provisions # This Privacy Policy governs the collection, processing, and protection of personal data of users of the railtech.uz website, operated by LLC RailTech (hereinafter referred to as “the Company”).
2. Data We Collect # When you use our website and services, we may collect the following data:
Contact Information — name, phone number, email address, company name Technical Data — IP address, browser type, operating system, language settings Usage Data — pages visited, time on site, referral source 3. Purpose of Data Processing # We use the collected data to:
Process inquiries and commercial proposals Communicate with users regarding partnership opportunities Improve website and service performance Conduct analytics and traffic reporting 4. Data Protection # We implement technical and organizational measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.
5. Third-Party Data Sharing # We do not share personal data with third parties, except as required by the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
6. Contact Information # For questions regarding personal data processing, please contact: privacy@railtech.uz
Last updated: January 2025
